title: phleum pratense f. elongatum
intro: Phleum pratense f. elongatum, also known as timothy grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Phleum pratense, characterized by its elongated panicles. The medicinal properties of timothy grass are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of timothy grass include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Timothy grass is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also consumed as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules or powders.
